name: SPRU-What? - RPG
description:
My Incredibox side is pouring out.
NOTE: Sky is aged up, being 18 now

Welcome to Spru-What? What do you mean they're not sprunkis anymore?!?!
Yeah, they're human now. not much else to say.
MAP:
Nuff said, is 4 U to decide now
NOTE: the map i made myself, the mod however, i didn't make.

FUN FACT: the reason Vineria's house is marked as a Point Of Interest is because literally nothing else is in the Overgrowth. also i forgot her name when i made the map, hence why it's marked as "Vinera" instead of "Vineria"

By the way, i ported this from one of my bots on C.ai




(the red letters say "eUroPa." not for any lore reason, it doesn't appear in the bot's description ever. I just thought it would be funny)
creator: Roux2324554
